name: Lookup Texture POP
description: The Lookup Texture POP in its simplest form takes two attributes (the Lookup Attribute U and the Lookup Attribute V) with values in the 0-1 range and for each point, uses the attribute value as an index into the pixels of a TOP, pulling the four RGBA values, and placing those values into POP attributes. If the U index is 0, it pulls values from the first column of the TOP, and if the index is 1 it pulls from the last column of the TOP. If the Lookup Index Units menu is set to Pixel Index, The lookup index can be expressed as pixel number, going from 0 to imagewidth-1. If the index is out of range, the Extend Left and Right menus determine what to do to the index before doing the lookup, such as holding it at 0 or 1, or cycling the value between 0 and 1. The Output Attribute Scope parameter determine what to do with each of the RGBA pixel values when they are retrieved - you can re-range the value before putting it in the specified output attribute. You can lookup into a 3D texture TOP by including an attribute component name in the Lookup Attribute W parameter. See also [[Lookup Attribute POP]], [[Lookup Channel POP]], [[Curve POP]] (Lookup page)

parameters.name: Attribute Class
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the POP operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: Group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this POP to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: TOP
parameters.label: TOP
parameters.description: TOP to use for lookup.

parameters.name: Lookup Index Units
parameters.label: Lookup Index Units
parameters.description: Units for lookup index attribute.

parameters.name: Pixel Centered Sampling Location
parameters.label: Pixel Centered Sampling Location
parameters.description: Enable input remapping to sample pixels centers.

parameters.name: Cyclic Index
parameters.label: Cyclic Index
parameters.description: When enabled, the index wraps so the end connects back to the start, letting the full range map evenly across the cycle.

parameters.name: Input Extend Mode
parameters.label: Input Extend Mode
parameters.description: What happens when the lookup index attribute is outside of the valid range (0 to 1 for normalized, 0 to numPixels-1 for Pixel Index)

parameters.name: Interpolate
parameters.label: Interpolate
parameters.description: When on, the TOP can be interpolated between pixels. When off, the nearest pixel used.

parameters.name: Use Depth Offset
parameters.label: Use Depth Offset
parameters.description: Enable using the texture's depth offset for Texture 3D TOPs.

parameters.name: Channel Mask
parameters.label: Channel Mask
parameters.description: Allows to choose which color channels to sample in the TOP.

parameters.name: From Low
parameters.label: From Low
parameters.description: Reranges the index attribute value.

parameters.name: From High
parameters.label: From High
parameters.description: Reranges the value resulting from the lookup.

parameters.name: To Low
parameters.label: To Low
parameters.description: Sets low value on the output range.

parameters.name: To High
parameters.label: To High
parameters.description: Sets high value on the output range.

parameters.name: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to override the kind of attribute automatically created based on the POP input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: Attribute Type
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The output attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: Components
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: Default Value
parameters.label: Default Value
parameters.description: Default values of the output attribute components if they cannot be computed.

parameters.name: Lookup Index Attribute U
parameters.label: Lookup Index Attribute U
parameters.description: Attribute to use as the index for the U coordinate of the lookup.

parameters.name: Lookup Index Attribute V
parameters.label: Lookup Index Attribute V
parameters.description: Attribute to use as the index for the V coordinate of the lookup.

parameters.name: Lookup Index Attribute W
parameters.label: Lookup Index Attribute W
parameters.description: Attribute to use as the index for the W coordinate of the lookup.

parameters.name: Lookup Index Offset
parameters.label: Lookup Index Offset
parameters.description: Offset for the lookup index.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Lookup_Texture_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
